name: Tampa's Own Fish Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Boneless and diced cooked Chicken (skinless)
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the bacon in a large pot until crispy. Remove with a slotted spoon and set aside.
2. In the same pan, add onions and garlic. Sauté until tender but not browned.
3. Add water, diced potatoes, carrots, celery, and paprika to the pot. Cook until the potatoes are nearly done.
4. Cut fish into 1-inch squares and add seasonings and fish to the pot at the same time.
5. Cook until the fish is flaky.
6. Stir in Half & Half. Adjust seasoning if needed.
